title: Between the Shadows Astral Lord & Astral Mage (pp. 49–53) — Pass A then Pass B
notes: Astral Plane character classes (pp. 49–53). Astral Lord lore/abilities pp. 50–52; Astral Mage lore/abilities pp. 52–53 with O.C.C. skills/P.P.E./I.S.P. tail on p. 54 (same block). Building an Astral Domain (p. 54+) referenced in Pass B only — not encoded as domain tables. Phased AB: composition Pass A per row, audit gate, then Pass B deep modules. Write to src/data/content/occs/nightbane/between_the_shadows.json. XP: Astral Lord → between_shadows_dream_astral; Astral Mage → between_shadows_millek_astral_mage.
